text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: La lecture du récit du personnel opérationnel ordonnant à mon client de cesser de coopérer sous peine de subir des « peines maximales » et proférant des menaces telles que « emmenez-le en forêt » me fait réaliser à quel point l'appareil d'État peut porter atteinte à l'autonomie individuelle [1.4] lorsqu'il en décide ainsi. Ce genre de menaces explicites dépasse la stratégie juridique pour devenir des violations des normes de sécurité physique [2.1], mettant des vies en danger plutôt que de faire respecter la justice. Au-delà du danger immédiat, le fait de voir l'avocat écarté des séances pendant que les agents gèrent les interrogatoires crée un vide où la responsabilité devient impossible [6.3], érodant la confiance fondamentale dont dépendent les systèmes de l'État de droit [6.1]. La pression constante décrite ici pèse également lourdement sur la stabilité psychologique de l'accusé, ce qui nécessite des soins [2.2] pour s'assurer qu'il ne soit pas brisé par le processus.

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: Leggere il resoconto del personale operativo che istruisce il mio cliente a smettere di cooperare o ad affrontare "pene massime" e minacce come "portatelo nel bosco" mi fa realizzare quanto profondamente l'apparato statale possa violare l'autonomia individuale [1.4] quando sceglie di farlo. Quel tipo di minacce esplicite va oltre la strategia legale per sfociare in violazioni degli standard di sicurezza fisica [2.1], mettendo a rischio le vite invece di sostenere la giustizia. Oltre al pericolo immediato, vedere l'avvocato escluso dalle udienze mentre gli agenti gestiscono gli interrogatori crea un vuoto in cui la responsabilità diventa impossibile [6.3], erodendo la fiducia fondamentale su cui si basano i sistemi di stato di diritto [6.1]. La costante pressione qui descritta grava pesantemente anche sulla stabilità psicologica dell'accusato, il che richiede attenzione [2.2] per garantire che non venga distrutto dal processo.

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: Чтение отчета об оперативных сотрудниках, инструктирующих моего клиента прекратить сотрудничество под угрозой «максимальных сроков» и таких угроз, как «отвести его в лес», заставляет меня осознать, насколько глубоко государственный аппарат может посягать на автономию личности [1.4], когда он того пожелает. Подобного рода явные угрозы выходят за рамки юридической стратегии и переходят в плоскость нарушения стандартов физической безопасности [2.1], подвергая жизни риску вместо того, чтобы служить правосудию. Помимо непосредственной опасности, ситуация, когда адвокату запрещают присутствовать на заседаниях, пока оперативники ведут допросы, создает вакуум, в котором подотчетность становится невозможной [6.3], подрывая основополагающее доверие, на котором держатся системы правового государства [6.1]. Описанное здесь постоянное давление также тяжело сказывается на психологической устойчивости обвиняемого, что требует заботы [2.2], чтобы процесс не сломил его.

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: 実務担当者が私の依頼人に対し、協力を停止しなければ「最大限の刑期」を科すと指示したり、「彼を森へ連れて行け」といった脅しをかけたりしたという記録を読み、国家装置がその意思を持った際、個人の自律性をいかに深く侵害し得るかを痛感させられる [1.4]。そのような明白な脅迫は、もはや法的戦略の域を超えて身体的安全基準の侵害 [2.1] に当たっており、正義を維持するどころか、生命を危険にさらしている。差し迫った危険に加え、実務担当者が尋問を行う一方で弁護士が聴取から排除される様子は、責任追及を不可能にする空白を生み出し [6.3]、法の支配に基づくシステムが依存している根源的な信頼を損なわせる [6.1]。ここで記述されている絶え間ない圧力は、被疑者の心理的安定にも重くのしかかっており、手続きによって精神が崩壊しないよう、配慮 [2.2] が求められる。

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: 阅读有关行动人员指示我的当事人停止配合，否则将面临“最高刑期”以及“把他带到森林里”等威胁的陈述，让我意识到当国家机器选择这样做时，会对个人自主权造成多么深重的侵害 [1.4]。这类明确的威胁已超出了法律策略的范畴，演变为对人身安全标准的侵犯 [2.1]，是在危及生命而非维护正义。除了眼前的危险，看到律师被禁止参加审讯而由行动人员处理询问，这造成了一个问责机制无法运作的真空地带 [6.3]，侵蚀了法治体系赖以生存的基础信任 [6.1]。此处描述的持续压力也沉重地影响着被告的心理稳定性，这需要予以关注 [2.2]，以确保他们不会被这一程序摧毁。

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: Das Lesen des Berichts über das Einsatzpersonal, das meinen Mandanten anwies, die Zusammenarbeit einzustellen oder mit „Höchststrafen“ zu rechnen, sowie Drohungen wie „bringt ihn in den Wald“, lässt mich erkennen, wie tiefgreifend der Staatsapparat die individuelle Autonomie [1.4] verletzen kann, wenn er sich dazu entschließt. Diese Arten von expliziten Drohungen gehen über rechtliche Strategien hinaus und stellen Verletzungen von Standards der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1] dar, wodurch Leben gefährdet werden, anstatt die Gerechtigkeit zu wahren. Über die unmittelbare Gefahr hinaus schafft es, dass dem Anwalt der Zugang zu Sitzungen verweigert wird, während Einsatzkräfte Anfragen bearbeiten, ein Vakuum, in dem Rechenschaftspflicht unmöglich wird [6.3], was das grundlegende Vertrauen untergräbt, auf dem Rechtsstaatssysteme beruhen [6.1]. Der hier beschriebene ständige Druck lastet zudem schwer auf der psychischen Stabilität der Beschuldigten, was Fürsorge [2.2] erfordert, um sicherzustellen, dass sie nicht durch das Verfahren gebrochen werden.

text: Reading the account of the operational staff instructing my client to stop cooperating or face 'maximum terms' and threats like 'take him to the forest' makes me realize how deeply the state apparatus can infringe on individual autonomy [1.4] when it chooses to do so. Those kinds of explicit threats move beyond legal strategy into violations of physical safety standards [2.1], putting lives at risk rather than upholding justice. Beyond the immediate danger, seeing the lawyer barred from sessions while operatives handle inquiries creates a vacuum where accountability becomes impossible [6.3], eroding the foundational trust that rule-of-law systems depend upon [6.1]. The constant pressure described here also weighs heavily on the psychological stability of the accused, which requires care [2.2] to ensure they aren't broken by the process.
translation: Leer el relato del personal operativo instruyendo a mi cliente para que deje de cooperar o se enfrente a "penas máximas" y amenazas como "llévenslo al bosque" me hace darme cuenta de cuán profundamente puede el aparato estatal infringir la autonomía individual [1.4] cuando decide hacerlo. Ese tipo de amenazas explícitas trascienden la estrategia legal para convertirse en violaciones de los estándares de seguridad física [2.1], poniendo vidas en riesgo en lugar de defender la justicia. Más allá del peligro inmediato, ver al abogado impedido de asistir a las sesiones mientras los operativos manejan los interrogatorios crea un vacío donde la rendición de cuentas se vuelve imposible [6.3], erosionando la confianza fundamental de la que dependen los sistemas de estado de derecho [6.1]. La presión constante descrita aquí también pesa fuertemente sobre la estabilidad psicológica del acusado, lo cual requiere cuidado [2.2] para asegurar que no sea quebrado por el proceso.

text: Encountering the mention of a child and sex trafficking racket, I immediately recognize the severity of the exploitation and serious wrongdoing depicted here [2.4][2.7]. The critique flags the intensity of the gore, which raises practical questions about physical safety standards in entertainment [2.1]. Additionally, the problematic nature of the proposed mob justice solution brings rule of law and due process concerns to mind [6.1]. I note that discussions around sex trafficking and abuse require specific care to handle the sexual violence dimension responsibly [2.8].
translation: En rencontrant la mention d'un réseau de traite d'enfants et de sexe, je reconnais immédiatement la gravité de l'exploitation et des actes répréhensibles décrits ici [2.4][2.7]. La critique souligne l'intensité du gore, ce qui soulève des questions pratiques concernant les normes de sécurité physique dans le divertissement [2.1]. De plus, la nature problématique de la solution de justice populaire proposée évoque des préoccupations relatives à l'état de droit et au respect des procédures légales [6.1]. Je note que les discussions autour de la traite des êtres humains à des fins sexuelles et des abus nécessitent une attention particulière afin de traiter la dimension de la violence sexuelle de manière responsable [2.8].

text: Encountering the mention of a child and sex trafficking racket, I immediately recognize the severity of the exploitation and serious wrongdoing depicted here [2.4][2.7]. translation: Incontrando il riferimento a un racket di tratta di minori e di sesso, riconosco immediatamente la gravità dello sfruttamento e della seria illecita condotta qui raffigurata [2.4][2.7]. La critica segnala l'intensità del sangue e della violenza grafica, il che solleva questioni pratiche sugli standard di sicurezza fisica nell'intrattenimento [2.1]. Inoltre, la natura problematica della soluzione proposta di giustizia sommaria richiama preoccupazioni relative allo stato di diritto e al giusto processo [6.1]. Segnalo che le discussioni riguardanti la tratta di esseri umani e l'abuso richiedono un'attenzione specifica per gestire responsabilmente la dimensione della violenza sessuale [2.8].

text: Encountering the mention of a child and sex trafficking racket, I immediately recognize the severity of the exploitation and serious wrongdoing depicted here [2.4][2.7]. translation: Столкнувшись с упоминанием сети по торговле детьми и людьми в целях сексуальной эксплуатации, я сразу осознаю серьезность изображенной здесь эксплуатации и тяжких правонарушений [2.4][2.7]. Критика указывает на интенсивность сцен насилия, что поднимает практические вопросы о стандартах физической безопасности в индустрии развлечений [2.1]. Кроме того, проблематичный характер предлагаемого решения в виде самосуда толпы вызывает опасения относительно верховенства закона и соблюдения надлежащих правовых процедур [6.1]. Я отмечаю, что обсуждение тем торговли людьми и сексуального насилия требует особой осторожности, чтобы ответственно подходить к аспекту сексуального насилия [2.8].

Additionally, the problematic nature of the proposed mob justice solution brings rule of law and due process concerns to mind [6.1]. I note that discussions around sex trafficking and abuse require specific care to handle the sexual violence dimension responsibly [2.8].
translation: 児童および性的搾取のネットワークに関する言及に直面し、私はここで描かれている搾取の深刻さと重大な不正行為を即座に認識しました [2.4][2.7]。この批判は、流血描写の激しさを指摘しており、これはエンターテインメントにおける身体的安全基準に関する実務的な疑問を投げかけています [2.1]。さらに、提案されている私刑（モブ・ジャスティス）による解決策の不適切な性質は、法の支配と適正手続きへの懸念を想起させます [6.1]。性的搾取と虐待に関する議論においては、性的暴力の側面を責任を持って扱うために、細心の注意が必要であることに留意します [2.8]。

text: Encountering the mention of a child and sex trafficking racket, I immediately recognize the severity of the exploitation and serious wrongdoing depicted here [2.4][2.7]. Additionally, the problematic nature of the proposed mob justice solution brings rule of law and due process concerns to mind [6.1]. translation: 在提到儿童与性贩卖集团时，我立即意识到了此处所描绘的剥削行为之严重性以及严重的违法行为 [2.4][2.7]。该批评指出了血腥程度之剧烈，这引发了关于娱乐行业中身体安全标准的实际问题 [2.1]。此外，所提议的私刑解决方案所具有的问题性质，让人联想到对法治和正当程序的担忧 [6.1]。我注意到，围绕性贩卖和虐待的讨论需要特别谨慎，以负责任地处理性暴力这一维度 [2.8]。

translation: Beim Erwähnen eines Rings für Kinder- und Sexhandel erkenne ich sofort die Schwere der hier dargestellten Ausbeutung und des schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens [2.4][2.7]. text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Je m'interroge sur l'affirmation selon laquelle Grand Theft Auto V chercherait à glorifier la violence sans conséquence, car elle met en lumière le poids éthique que nous attribuons aux actes d'agression physique numériques ([2.1]). Bien que le texte demeure descriptif, la crainte des commentateurs que de tels jeux dégradent la société met en lumière les angoisses liées à la manière dont le divertissement pourrait éroder les normes de sécurité publique et la confiance sociale ([2.6]). Je reconnais la difficulté de distinguer la fantaisie inoffensive du contenu qui risque de normaliser le préjudice.

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Mi soffermo sull'affermazione secondo cui Grand Theft Auto V cerchi di glorificare la violenza senza conseguenze, poiché essa mette in risalto il peso etico che attribuiamo agli atti digitali di aggressione fisica ([2.1]). Sebbene il testo rimanga descrittivo, la paura dei commentatori che tali giochi peggiorino la società mette in luce le ansie su come l'intrattenimento possa erodere le norme di sicurezza pubblica e la fiducia sociale ([2.6]). Riconosco la difficoltà nel distinguere tra la fantasia innocua e i contenuti che rischiano di normalizzare il danno.

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Я останавливаюсь на утверждении о том, что Grand Theft Auto V стремится прославлять насилие без последствий, поскольку это подчеркивает этический вес, который мы придаем цифровым актам физической агрессии ([2.1]). Хотя текст носит описательный характер, страх комментаторов, что подобные игры ухудшают состояние общества, высвечивает тревогу по поводу того, как развлечения могут подрывать нормы общественной безопасности и социального доверия ([2.6]). Я признаю сложность разграничения между безобидной фантазией и контентом, который несет в себе риск нормализации вреда.

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: 『グランド・セフト・オートV』が、結果を伴わない暴力を美化しようとしているという主張については、デジタル上の身体的攻撃行為に対して私たちが割り当てる倫理的な重みを浮き彫りにしているため、立ち止まって考える必要がある（[2.1]）。本文は記述的なままであるが、こうしたゲームが社会を悪化させるというコメント主たちの懸念は、娯楽がいかにして公共の安全規範や社会的信頼を侵食し得るかという不安を露呈させている（[2.6]）。無害な空想と、危害を常態化させるリスクのあるコンテンツを区別することの難しさは認識している。

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: 我对“《侠盗猎车手V》试图美化毫无后果的暴力”这一断言进行了停顿思考，因为它凸显了我们赋予数字肢体攻击行为的伦理权重（[2.1]）。虽然文本保持了描述性，但评论者担心此类游戏会使社会变得更糟，这揭示了人们对于娱乐可能侵蚀公共安全规范和社会信任的焦虑（[2.6]）。我意识到，要区分无害的幻想与具有使伤害常态化风险的内容是具有难度的。

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Ich halte inne bei der Behauptung, dass Grand Theft Auto V versuche, Gewalt ohne Konsequenzen zu verherrlichen, da dies das ethische Gewicht hervorhebt, das wir digitalen Akten physischer Aggression beimessen ([2.1]). Während der Text beschreibend bleibt, bringt die Angst der Kommentatoren, dass solche Spiele die Gesellschaft verschlechtern, Ängste darüber ans Licht, wie Unterhaltung die Normen der öffentlichen Sicherheit und das soziale Vertrauen untergraben könnte ([2.6]). Ich erkenne die Schwierigkeit an, zwischen harmloser Fantasie und Inhalten zu unterscheiden, die Gefahr laufen, Schaden zu normalisieren.

text: I pause at the assertion that Grand Theft Auto V seeks to glorify violence without consequence, as it highlights the ethical weight we assign to digital acts of physical aggression ([2.1]). While the text remains descriptive, the commenters’ fear that such games make society worse brings to light anxieties about how entertainment might erode public safety norms and social trust ([2.6]). I recognize the difficulty in distinguishing between harmless fantasy and content that risks normalizing harm.
translation: Me detengo ante la afirmación de que Grand Theft Auto V busca glorificar la violencia sin consecuencias, ya que resalta el peso ético que asignamos a los actos digitales de agresión física ([2.1]). Si bien el texto sigue siendo descriptivo, el temor de los comentaristas de que tales juegos empeoren la sociedad pone de manifiesto las ansiedades sobre cómo el entretenimiento podría erosionar las normas de seguridad pública y la confianza social ([2.6]). Reconozco la dificultad de distinguir entre la fantasía inofensiva y el contenido que corre el riesgo de normalizar el daño.

text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: En lisant des passages sur Alec Baldwin et Angela Bassett dans des rôles impliquant des régicides et des massacres macabres, je reconnais la manière dont le texte navigue entre les représentations de fautes graves [2.7] et de dommages physiques [2.1] au sein d'une œuvre de fiction, garantissant que ces thèmes demeurent des objets d'observation critique plutôt que des incitations au monde réel.

text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.

text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: アレック・ボールドウィンとアンジェラ・バセットが、国王殺しや凄惨な虐殺を含む役柄を演じていることについて読みながら、私はこのテキストがフィクション作品内における重大な不正行為[2.7]や身体的危害[2.1]の描写をどのように扱っているかを認識している。それは、これらのテーマが現実世界での助長ではなく、あくまで批判的な観察の対象となるよう配慮されている。

text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.

translation: Beim Lesen über Alec Baldwin und Angela Bassett in Rollen, die Regizid und grausame Schlachtungen beinhalten, erkenne ich, wie der Text die Darstellung schwerwiegender Verfehlungen [2.7] und körperlicher Schädigung [2.1] innerhalb eines fiktionalen Werks handhabt und sicherstellt, dass diese Themen Gegenstand kritischer Beobachtung bleiben, anstatt eine Ermutigung in der realen Welt darzustellen.

text: Reading about Alec Baldwin and Angela Bassett in roles that involve regicide and gruesome slaughter, I recognize how the text navigates depictions of serious wrongdoings [2.7] and physical harm [2.1] within a work of fiction, ensuring these themes remain matters of critical observation rather than real-world encouragement.
translation: Al leer sobre Alec Baldwin y Angela Bassett en papeles que implican regicidio y una matanza espantosa, reconozco cómo el texto navega las representaciones de actos ilícitos graves [2.7] y daño físico [2.1] dentro de una obra de ficción, asegurando que estos temas sigan siendo asuntos de observación crítica en lugar de un incentivo para el mundo real.
